quickactions.title: Quick Actions
hero.sub: Secure, role-based institutional onboarding for students, faculty and parents. Trusted by educational institutions across the network.
role.label: Step 1 — Identify Your Role
role.title: Who are you?
role.desc: Select your role to get a tailored access request experience.
role.student.title: Student Access
role.student.desc: Join your classroom and academic workspace. Access grades, assignments, timetable and more.
role.faculty.title: Faculty Access
role.faculty.desc: Manage classes, attendance, assignments and communication. Full academic control panel.
role.parent.title: Parent Access
role.parent.desc: Track student performance, receive notices and stay connected with institution updates.
verify.label: Step 2 — Institution Verification
verify.title: Verify your institution
verify.desc: Enter your campus details to verify institutional membership before proceeding.
verify.name: Institution Name
form.label: Step 3 — Personal Information
form.title: Complete your request
form.desc: All information is encrypted and used solely for identity verification.
success.title: Request Submitted
success.desc: Your access request has been received and is pending institutional review.
success.save: Save this ID to track your request status.
security.title: Security Center
security.email.title: Email Verification
security.email.body: OTP verification, institution approval, verified email binding and a recovery channel ensure every account is bound to a real, reachable identity.
security.dup.title: Duplicate Detection
security.dup.body: Identity fingerprinting prevents the same person from holding multiple active accounts within a single institution node.
security.inst.title: Institution Validation
security.inst.body: Every campus code is cross-referenced against the verified institution registry before any request can proceed.
security.role.title: Role-Based Access
security.role.body: Students, faculty and parents each receive a distinct permission scope — no role can access data outside its boundary.
security.enc.title: Encryption Layer
security.enc.body: AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS in transit, with a zero-knowledge architecture across every campus node.
security.footer: Your data is stored securely on Firebase and never shared with third parties. Access is granted only after institutional verification.
status.label: Request Portal
status.title: Track Existing Request
status.desc: Already submitted? Check the current status of your access request.
support.label: Support
support.title: Support Gateway
support.desc: Need help? Reach out through any channel below.
support.email.title: Email Support
support.admin.title: Institution Admin
support.live.title: Live Support
support.help.title: Help Center
why.label: Platform
why.title: Why CampusOne?
why.desc: Enterprise-grade infrastructure built for modern educational institutions.
why.enc.title: End-to-End Encryption
why.enc.desc: All data encrypted at rest and in transit using AES-256. Zero-knowledge architecture.
why.cloud.title: Cloud Synchronisation
why.cloud.desc: Real-time sync across all devices. Access your workspace from anywhere, anytime.
why.tenant.title: Multi-Tenant Architecture
why.tenant.desc: Complete data isolation between institutions. Each campus is a secure, independent node.
why.notif.title: Real-Time Notifications
why.notif.desc: Push alerts for grades, attendance, assignments and announcements.
why.auto.title: Academic Workflow Automation
why.auto.desc: Automated timetables, exam schedules, fee reminders and report generation.
why.parent.title: Parent Communication Hub
why.parent.desc: Seamless parent–teacher communication with structured progress tracking.
footer.sub: Institutional access management for the modern campus
